gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/422)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/422)
text: مَنْ جَمَعَ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ مَا لَا يَنْكِحُ فَزَنَى مِنْهُنَّ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَالْإِثْمُ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abu Al Abbas Al Kufy,

(It has been narrated) from Muhammad Bin Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, from one of his men, from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who gathers the women and does not copulate with them, so one of them were to commit adultery, so the sin would be upon him’.
en.sarwar: 42. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from abu al-‘Abbas al-Kufiy from Muhammad ibn Ja’far from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one accumulates women without going to bed with them then if certain ones among them commit fornication, the sin will rest on such a man.’”
